DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-14-2025 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS PRESIDIO SURGERY CENTER, LLC, SURGICAL CARE AFFILIATES, LLC, TRACY PERELMUTER, AND ANDRE SCHOTTE's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The demurrer to the IIED claim is sustained with 20 days leave to amend as to defendant Schotte (see word minutes for complete ruling).

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
